Create backend/routers/export.py with four StreamingResponse endpoints

Execute 05-02: wire handleExport + exportLoading on BugReportPage.jsx + SprintPage.jsx

blockers.description: npm install EACCES on WSL NTFS mount (pre-existing)

decisions.decision: Excel export = single sheet raw bug table, columns: ID|Summary|Status|Priority|Assignee|Fix Version
decisions.rationale: Raw data so user can filter/sort in Excel

decisions.decision: Word BugReport = title+metadata+stats+donut chart (matplotlib, wedgeprops width=0.5)+bug table
Word Sprint = title+metadata+fix version info+stats+bug table, NO chart
decisions.rationale: Sprint report is release-centric, not status-chart-centric

decisions.decision: Sprint export uses active sprint (state=active) or first sprint if none active
decisions.rationale: SprintPage shows all fix versions without selection mechanism

decisions.decision: No get_current_user auth dep on export endpoints — ambient OAuth, same as all other routers
decisions.rationale: Codebase has no JWT per-endpoint auth; pattern mapper confirmed

next_action: Write .planning/phases/05-export/05-01-SUMMARY.md (all 3 tasks committed: 7223c94, ad9229b, 85f086a). Then execute plan 05-02: wire handleExport + exportLoading on BugReportPage.jsx and SprintPage.jsx.
